query_text: the lightest ski that still has good edge grip and stability for groomed runs

results.explanation: Nordica Santa Ana 98 excels in: edge_grip, stability_at_speed. Solid on: playfulness. Review: "The titanal construction gives it... edge grip for a lighter all-mountain ski." Review: "Edge grip is good, playfulness is moderate." Review: "Stability is good, playfulness is moderate."

Nordica Enforcer 100 excels in: edge_grip, stability_at_speed. Weaker on: playfulness. Review: "Handles crud and chop like a champ." Review: "Edge grip on hardpack is surprisingly good for 100mm." Review: "The titanal makes it damp and stable at speed."

Solid on: edge_grip, stability_at_speed. Weaker on: playfulness. Review: "Decent playfulness and edge grip." Review: "Edge grip is good but not outstanding." Review: "Not as stable as full titanal skis at speed but lighter and more maneuverable."

K2 Disruption 78C excels in: edge_grip. Solid on: stability_at_speed. Weaker on: playfulness. Review: "has enough edge grip for confident turns." Review: "good enough edge grip for basic carving." Review: "Gets a bit nervous on ice and at speed."

ground_truth.reason: 1350g very light, but edge grip only 5 and stability 3
1550g moderate, edge grip 8, stability 7 — best balance
1580g moderate, edge grip 8, stability 8 — excellent balance
1650g moderate, edge grip 7, stability 6 — decent balance
